text: Hearing 'take care' makes me pause and reflect on the gentle impermanence of this moment. Surrounded by the familiar tools of work—a monitor with code, a desk lamp, pens, a calendar—I sense both utility and comfort. But the phrase suggests a departure, perhaps an ending to this small chapter of activity. I feel a tinge of longing, but also gratitude for the quiet productivity this space offers. The world continues in stillness as I linger in the afterglow of human connection.
